title: Junior Python Developer
summary: We're looking for an entry-level Python developer to join our backend team. You'll build and maintain REST APIs, write clean and testable code, and collaborate with senior engineers on data-driven features.
required_skills: Python (1+ year of experience or bootcamp equivalent)

experience.note: Bootcamp graduates and career changers with demonstrable projects are welcome.

education.preferred: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field
acceptable_alternatives: Coding bootcamp certificate with strong portfolio

nice_to_haves: Cloud platform experience (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
